message:
test(terminal_model): add 51 edge-case tests for ANSI parser, cursor boundaries, SGR, erase, OSC8, out-of-bounds, traits (bd-1p1kn)

New coverage:
- CellDiff Display/Debug/Clone traits
- Rgb/ModelStyle/ModelCell Default/Debug/Clone/Eq traits
- Cursor wrap at bottom edge, LF at bottom, BS at col 0
- Tab near end of line, tab at end
- CUP 'f' variant, CUP clamp to bounds, CUP zero params
- Cursor movement with explicit param=1 vs no-param=0
- Erase display ToStart, erase display preserves cursor
- Erase line at row 0
- SGR: insufficient truecolor params (fg+bg), empty reset,
  unknown codes, zero-in-middle resets, blink/reverse reset,
  SGR 22 resets both bold+dim, accumulated sequences
- Multi-byte UTF-8 → '?' substitution
- Out-of-bounds: char_at, style_at, link_at, row_text
- Screen text: all empty, trailing empty lines trimmed
- Unknown escape/CSI sequences → ground state
- CSI private mode prefix ignored, save/restore cursor ignored
- OSC8 link toggle (on/off/different link)
- CR+LF sequences, multiple backspaces
- Feed empty bytes/string
- Control chars ignored (NUL, SOH, etc.)
- Printable ASCII range (0x20-0x7e)
- Width-1 and height-1 terminals
- Put char at bottom-right corner

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
